title: The problem with Evangelion hentai doujinshi
display_title: The problem with Evangelion hentai doujinshi
wikitext:
[]: The problem with Evangelion hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by lily liver » Mon Mar 07, 2016 11:05 pm the most persistent thing that bothers me when i see them/stumble on them/flip through one out of curiosity is that it usually never really features a character from the series. they look the same, but is it really the same character ? i get it, its someones fantasy, but it bothers me on a deeper level that the characters barely resemble their official-canon counterparts in how they would act, or what sort of situation they would put themselves in. i've only actually taken the time to read one of them, which was Re-Take, and it treated the characters pretty faithfully. they still had depth, they still had their general strengths and weaknesses, struggles, insecurities, and so on. most of them i see appear to replace the subject characters' entire personality with one solitary attribute, which is that for some reason they are sex crazed, because the genre demands it. maybe i'm weird for feeling this way, but when i'm browsing some hentai gallery and i scroll past a hentai pic or doujinshi page of Asuka or Rei or Shinji behaving in a way that completely betrays their original character in a really shallow and baseless way, i die inside just a little bit. what is your opinion on this?

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:16 am I don't think a lot of the Doujinshi is suppose to make sense within the realm of relating to the original series, especially not hentai Doujinshi. More or less it's used as the one thing all hentai is used for.... Catch my drift? In the sense of characters not acting the way they are suppose to when I got into the series I did recall seeing this one Doji series where Kaji and Asuka are doing the deed, and then Misato and Shinji. I just remember being incredibly just "That's really fucken odd." about the whole thing. (Also to mention that really terribly bad hentai movie that has an orgy in the command deck with Maya absent, anyone here long enough will know what I'm talking about).

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:18 am lily liver wrote: what is your opinion on this?

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:26 am Reichu wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by lily liver » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:32 am Sicarius VI wrote: that really terribly bad hentai movie that has an orgy in the command deck with Maya absent

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:40 am Sicarius VI wrote: is this where your *apparent* charm comes from?

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:27 pm lily liver wrote: most of them i see appear to replace the subject characters' entire personality with one solitary attribute, which is that for some reason they are sex crazed, because the genre demands it. maybe i'm weird for feeling this way, but when i'm browsing some hentai gallery and i scroll past a hentai pic or doujinshi page of Asuka or Rei or Shinji behaving in a way that completely betrays their original character in a really shallow and baseless way, i die inside just a little bit.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Glor » Tue Mar 08, 2016 12:56 pm I don't read doujin for the story. Sicarius VI wrote: Also to mention that really terribly bad hentai movie that has an orgy in the command deck with Maya absent.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Tue Mar 08, 2016 1:13 pm Hentai isnt really meant to make sense, I mean anyone remember this gem?: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Mar 08, 2016 1:31 pm Rosenakahara wrote: Its just, if the character isnt going to act in character what's the point?

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Mar 08, 2016 10:59 pm Everyone's views here raises a particular question for me. Why do some people desire to see the Eva characters in sexual activities in the first place, whether it's in doujinshi or in lemon fanfics? Is it because they desire to see something that wasn't shown in the anime or is it just for their own sexual gratification? That is something I don't get.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by lily liver » Tue Mar 08, 2016 11:13 pm i suspect that a lot of this stuff is produced by people who either flat out don't care about eva, and are only attracted to the characters by looks alone. why would they care about any of this if that's the case? the second option are people who may like the show, but don't have any special emotional investment in it. again, why would they care? there are plenty of characters i've seen who i don't care about beyond the fact that they look hot.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by lily liver » Tue Mar 08, 2016 11:27 pm cryharding^ they/we are just attracted to the character for various reasons, like being attracted to the way they look. in the case of something having an actual plot, like re-take, its because of a legit emotional investment in the characters' life, which i guess you could call "emotional porn" or "romantic porn" if you want. when i read re-take, i actually didn't feel much arousal despite the fact that it is explicit, i just read it front to back like any other manga, and being able to see two characters who i care about in a very intimate situation which for once, wasn't treated like a cheap throwaway thing, it provided another dimension of emotional depth to the story that you don't see very often.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Glor » Tue Mar 08, 2016 11:45 pm cyharding wrote: Everyone's views here raises a particular question for me. Why do some people desire to see the Eva characters in sexual activities in the first place, whether it's in doujinshi or in lemon fanfics?

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by CarlosIXA » Wed Mar 09, 2016 11:13 am Reichu wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 09, 2016 12:46 pm CarlosIXA wrote: By the way, explanation doesn't help it look any less ridiculous.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by CarlosIXA » Wed Mar 09, 2016 1:49 pm Reichu wrote: It's not supposed to. Looking ridiculous was kind of the point.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Mar 09, 2016 8:15 pm I feel like if Asuka, Rei and Shinji(less Rei) where in High School it would make a difference and some hentai content may have appeared in the show. Not to mention it would've changed a lot of character interaction too, but that is for a different thread that has most likely been created. Like CarlosIXA wrote: Oh my gawd . With that out of my system, Eva hentai. I don't really much care to critique most Doujinshi releases of Eva, especially ones where the characters straddle and, well, have their way with each other like a bunch of horny teenagers (then again, most of the subjects of these books are teenagers...), mostly because I see no point in asking for consistency from artists and/or writers when the reason for making what they made was they wanted to create spank material.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 09, 2016 9:49 pm Sicarius VI wrote: Also even in the show they make it a point to say Kaji and Misato go through a typical college life with all the banging they did.

[]: Re: the problem with eva hentai doujinshi             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Mar 09, 2016 9:57 pm Reichu wrote: They holed up in Misato's apartment for a week straight , Misato blew off both academic and social obligations, and Kaji was basically humoring her by the end of it ("Again?"). Is that "typical"?
